translation.forgotPasswordText: Enter your email. We'll send a link to reset your password.
translation.caption: Caption
translation.reasonForDenialPlaceholder: Tell your volunteer why their photo was denied.
translation.approveConfirm: Are you sure want to approve this item?
translation.approvalsCaughtUp: You are all caught up on approvals.
translation.deleteConfirm: Are you sure want to delete this item?
translation.captionText: Before writing a custom description please review the preapproved captions above in order to expidite translation and immigration reviews.
translation.captionPlaceholder: Describe what you did and how it helps the Thai community.
translation.reviewSubmissionText: You are editing an activity from the approval process. After saving you will also approve this photo for use in reports.
translation.captionHelps: My caption describes how this activity is helping the Thai community.
translation.captionTagged: I have tagged everyone on my team who is in the photo.
translation.feedbackText: Questions about the Adroit mobile app? Suggestions? Need to report a bug? Or just want to tell us how much you love the app??
translation.locationItem1: Be specific regarding the location of the photo.
translation.savedLocationsText: As an alternative to selecting one of the default FCF locations, you can add a new location when uploading an activity photo.
translation.dataIntroCalendar: Look at your photos with a new calendar view to help you see where you may need to upload missing photos.
translation.dataIntroStatusBar: Immigration has updated their requirements so we have updated our status bar to help you meet their new criteria.
translation.dataIntroApproved: This is the number of your photos that have been approved this month.
translation.dataIntroNew: This is how many new photos you have uploaded this month that have not yet been approved.
translation.dataIntroDays: Keep an eye on how many days are left in the current month.
translation.dataIntroStatus: Quickly check whether you are on track with your photo uploads for this month.
translation.dataIntroAddNew: Tap here to submit a new activity photo.
translation.dataIntroMonthlyProgress: This is how many of your photos have been approved on separate days this month. You are required to upload at least 3 photos on separate days each week.
translation.switchLanguage: เปลี่ยนเป็นภาษาไทย
